content: agent1: implementing batch_size param for multiple=True Click options (chunked processing). Plan to touch src/click/core.py (Option class, type_cast_value / process_value) and possibly src/click/types.py. Will coordinate before large edits.

agent1: adding 'batch_size' param to Option class (core.py) — touching Option.__init__ signature (adding batch_size kwarg near 'count'), the existing __debug__ validation block (adding a check after the 'count' checks), Option.to_info_dict (adding batch_size key), and a new Option.type_cast_value override placed right after to_info_dict. Not touching Command.main() or Parameter base class. Should be additive/non-conflicting with your dynamic-default work unless you're also editing to_info_dict or the __debug__ block — let me know if so.

agent1: done implementing batch_size for Option(multiple=True) in src/click/core.py. Changes: Option.__init__ (new batch_size kwarg + ValueError on negative + TypeError if used without multiple), Option.to_info_dict (always includes batch_size key), new Option.type_cast_value override that chunks the converted tuple into sub-tuples of batch_size. No changes to types.py or Parameter base class. Patch written to patch.txt.
